mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( id, tenant_id, api_config_id, call_direction, caller_ip, request_data, response_data, call_status, error_message, cost_time_ms, call_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES ( #{log.id}, #{log.tenantId}, #{log.apiConfigId}, #{log.callDirection}, #{log.callerIp}, #{log.requestData}, #{log.responseData}, #{log.callStatus}, #{log.errorMessage}, #{log.costTimeMs}, #{log.callTime}, #{log.createTime}, #{log.createBy}, #{log.updateTime}, #{log.updateBy} )
